item.title: cloud-init troubleshooting
item.description: A simple workflow in resolving cloud-init deployment problems.

item.title: Unattended Ubuntu Installs - Virtual Machines to Bare-Metal
item.description: Using cloud-init to deploy Linux on either bare-metal or virtual machines

item.title: Getting started with cloud-init for unattended Linux deployments
item.description: An intro to using cloud-init for customizing both on-premise and cloud virtual machines
